sentences.translation: Komšije su posjetile porodicu s novorođenčetom.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbors visited the family of a newborn.

sentences.translation: Donijeli su male poklone za bebu.
sentences.translationEn: They brought small gifts for the baby.

sentences.translation: Čestitali su majci i ocu na novorođenčetu.
sentences.translationEn: They congratulated the mother and father on the newborn.

sentences.translation: Rekli su «Mabruk i Allah vas blagoslovio».
sentences.translationEn: They said «Congratulations and may God bless you».

sentences.translation: Majka je bila jako sretna njihovom posjetom.
sentences.translationEn: The mother was very happy with their visit.
